mdRecord.dcterms:title: Criminal Warrants, Justice of the Peace: Commonwealth vs Robert Janney, Noah Janney and Boss Rakes
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Commonwealth vs Robert Janney, Noah Janney and Boss Rakes Offense: Assault and Battery Victim: Jack Peak and Frank Martin Complainant: Jack Peak Recorded in Floyd County Courthouse 08.07.1887 Noah Janney was Put in Jail so he could be examined by court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
Warrants (Law)
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
